caption: A man with a shaved head, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and dark tie, speaks during a press conference. He is positioned in front of a repetitive backdrop featuring logos for "LaLiga," "CAJA RURAL GRANADA," "CERVEZAS ALHAMBRA," and "PULEVA." In the upper frames, he looks forward with a serious expression while subtitles read, "Hay que estar muy orgulloso del equipo porque You've got to be really proud of the team because CERVEZAS." A timer showing "00:37" is visible on the left side of these frames. As the scene progresses to the lower frames, the man continues speaking, and the subtitles change. The first lower frame displays, "no es fácil lograr 9 victorias en 9 partidos. it's not easy to get nine Wins in nine games. CERVEZAS," and the final frame shows, "Y bueno, ¿qué vamos a pedir? So, what else am I going to ask for? CERVEZAS."
